/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/sim.dir/common/thc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/common/generalexception.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/common/socketinstance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/common/PGNUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/src/sim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/src/telnetserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/src/Sprite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/src/Button.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/src/Component.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/src/UIGroup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/src/Label.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/src/FontManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sim.dir/src/Window.cpp.o  -o sim -lSDL2 -lSDL2_image -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lpthread -lSDL2_image -lSDL2_ttf -lpthread
